_comment: v2.6 regression snapshot: captures v2.5 vector-only baseline. Update this file ONLY when intentionally accepting a quality shift after eval inspection. The eval threshold-fails when current vector-only recall@8 drops > 1pp below this value.
notes: Conservative baseline pinned at the gold-set's threshold. The 14-query synthetic set + 1 optional live query covers entry-point discovery, nested-section navigation, error-message + exact-symbol queries, and 5 new v2.6 rerank-sensitive queries (single-word lexical match, descriptive phrasing, deep-nesting cues, public-API surface).
